title: RFQ2BOQ Phase 9 — Comprehensive Corpus Extraction Report

pipeline_health.notes: 0 failures across all processed files. 24 large PDFs skipped due to pipeline timeout (>10min each) — OCR-heavy scanned documents.

test_results.mypy: pass (with numpy compat issue, not project code)

test_suite_detail.comprehensive_test_script: 9/9 passed (imports, pipeline, df, upload, timeout, excel/json/csv export, file-not-found)

limitations: 24 large PDFs (scanned/image-based) not processed due to 10-min pipeline timeout — OCR is slow on these.
Multi-file batch not testable via AppTest (st.file_uploader lacks accept_multiple_files=True).
PDF pipeline runs 2.3s avg for text-extractable docs but 40s+ for scanned docs with OCR fallback.
Missing 108 corpus files on disk resolved via ALL_RFQS symlinks to Desktop repo.
recommendations: Fix ALL_RFQS symlinks permanently (or copy specs from Desktop repo into data/specifications/).
Add accept_multiple_files=True to st.file_uploader in ui/app.py for true multi-file batch tests.
Pre-extract text from scanned PDFs to reduce OCR overhead in pipeline.
Add per-file timeout in Pipeline.run() to prevent hung extractions.
